title: guajava refracta
intro: Guajava refracta, also known as Guajava or Guava, is a tropical evergreen shrub native to Central and South America, its name coming from the Arawak word for the fruit, guayaba. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high levels of antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Guajava refracta include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and aiding in digestion, making it a valuable herbal remedy for gastrointestinal issues and other ailments. Guajava refracta can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tinctures, and capsules, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
